<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get public widget configuration"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/widget/config/{integrationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns sanitized widget config for embedding. Checks Origin against allowedDomains.
